headline: Estée Lauder Taps WPP To Power One ELC Media And Profits
summary: Estée Lauder Companies (NYSE:EL) has appointed WPP as its first unified global media partner. The agreement supports Estée Lauder's shift to an enterprise-led global media system under its One ELC operating model. This move is part of the company’s broader digital transformation and Beauty Reimagined initiative. Estée Lauder Companies, a global player in prestige beauty across skin care, makeup, fragrance, and hair care, is reshaping how it runs media and marketing worldwide. By...

headline: EssilorLuxottica (ENXTPA:EL) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: EssilorLuxottica Société anonyme (ENXTPA:EL) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the stock with negative returns over the past month and the past three months, prompting investors to reassess its €87.8b eyewear business. See our latest analysis for EssilorLuxottica Société anonyme. The recent 10.6% 1 month share price decline, alongside a 30.2% 3 month share price fall, contrasts with a 49.4% 5 year total shareholder return. This suggests shorter term momentum is fading while...
